## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `mypy` passes (strict)
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes and new behaviour has tests
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (for public API changes)
- [ ] Docs / README updated if needed
